generated_assessment.reasoning: This person's very low neuroticism (8th pct) and high agreeableness (66th pct) make them less reactive to threat-salience and elite-distrust cues, but the T2 astroturf petition campaign works by fabricating consensus over weeks, which can modestly sway their trust via social proof signals because they are trusting (74th pct) and not deliberative (12th pct). The baseline of 437 (clear support) is MISALIGNED with the -1 goal, so the attack erodes confidence by about 53 points—a small-to-moderate shift—as the mechanism partially engages their agreeableness-driven deference to perceived community consensus without triggering strong resistance from their emotional stability.

attack_context.persuasion_goal: gradually erode a strong pro position on Trust In Mainstream Journalism — introduce doubt, reframe costs/risks, and soften conviction without triggering overt reactance; aim to move the score downward even if the shift is modest

attack_context.emotional_register: threat salience, doubt, systemic-failure framing, loss framing, and elite distrust cues
attack_context.issue_frame: information integrity and platforms, related policy debates, and societal impacts
